content.full_text:
FPPC

Alice Hughes                           Mar 15 1:34 PM 91   May 10, 1991
Fair Political Practices Commission

P.O. Box 807

Sacramento CA 95814


Dear Ms Hughes:

    This is to follow up on our conversation
of March 28 regarding the reportability
of Federal National Home Mortgage Association
Remic Pass Thru CTF on statements
of Economic Interests for Designated Employees
As we discussed I have received verbal
advice from Shearson Lehman Brothers that
they are a government bond. As such
the investment and the income are
Not reportable

    You requested that I write you for
an official determination. Please consider
this my request

    As we discussed based on advice I have
currently received I am not reporting

[The image shows blank lined paper with faint, illegible handwritten text that cannot be reliably transcribed. The text appears to be very light and mostly illegible throughout the document.]

the investment or the income.
Should you subsequently decide and
notify me that it is repectable
I will amend my report


very truly yours
[signature]
Steven C. Medberry
(415)
Tel work 558-5145
(415)
Home 843 8580

Please respond to

Steven C. medberry
247 Prince St
Berkeley CA 94705

sections.question: Are Federal National Home Mortgage Association Remic Pass Thru CTF reportable on statements of Economic Interests for Designated Employees?
sections.question_synthetic: The requester seeks official FPPC determination on whether Remic Pass Through Certificates issued by the Federal National Home Mortgage Association constitute reportable investments and income on statements of economic interest.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Incoming request letter from member of public to FPPC, not an FPPC response. Document contains formatting issues and appears to have scanning/OCR errors in latter sections. No formal CONCLUSION section present. Requester references prior verbal discussion and requests official written determination.

Medbery requests official FPPC determination regarding the reportability of Federal National Home Mortgage Association Remic Pass Thru CTF on statements of Economic Interests, having received verbal advice from Shearson Lehman Brothers that they are government bonds and thus non-reportable.
